title: Zhipu AI Launches 1GW Domestic AI Computing Center and Acquires Zhongke Jiahe to Strengthen AI Infra Capabilities
excerpt: According to foreign media reports, ZhiPu AI (Z.ai) has completed the construction of a 1GW-level domestic AI computing data center, with the overall system usi
content_html:
According to foreign media reports, ZhiPu AI (Z.ai) has completed the construction of a 1GW-level domestic AI computing data center, with the overall system using domestically produced AI chips. Meanwhile, the company recently completed the acquisition of XCore Sigma, a domestic AI heterogeneous computing software enterprise, further enhancing its AI infrastructure layout from computing resources to foundational software.

It is understood that XCore Sigma originated from the Compiler Laboratory of the Institute of Computing Technology at the Chinese Academy of Sciences. The company has long focused on heterogeneous computing software stacks, compiler optimization, runtime systems, and AI inference infrastructure, and is regarded as one of the leading AI Infra technology teams in China. This acquisition will enhance ZhiPu's capabilities in adapting to domestic chips, computing resource scheduling, and model deployment optimization.

Industry experts believe that ZhiPu's two recent moves correspond to the "computing power supply" and "computing power release" stages of the AI industry chain. Among them, the 1GW-level domestic computing center can provide stable computing resources for large-scale model training; XCore Sigma's software technology helps improve the computing efficiency of different types of AI chips, enhancing hardware utilization and reducing model inference costs through compiler, Runtime, and inference engine optimizations.

As the competition in large models enters a stage where infrastructure and engineering capabilities are being compared, AI companies are shifting from merely pursuing model size to building a complete technical system covering chips, computing power, software stacks, and application deployment. Recently, the market has been closely watching ZhiPu's next-generation foundational models. Some views suggest that with the support of large-scale domestic computing resources, an established AI Infra system, and long-term accumulated post-training capabilities, ZhiPu's future models are expected to continue developing toward larger parameter scales and higher levels of intelligence, while improving inference efficiency and practical deployment capabilities.

This computing center construction and integration of basic software capabilities mark that domestic large model enterprises are accelerating the development of an autonomous and controllable AI infrastructure ecosystem, reflecting that AI industry competition is expanding from model capabilities to full-stack technological system competition.

Meanwhile, the company recently completed the acquisition of XCore Sigma, a domestic AI heterogeneous computing software enterprise, further enhancing its AI infrastructure layout from computing resources to foundational software.

sentences.en: According to foreign media reports, ZhiPu AI (Z.ai) has completed the construction of a 1GW-level domestic AI computing data center, with the overall system using domestically produced AI chips.
sentences.zh: 据外媒报道，智普AI（Z.ai）已完成国内1GW级AI计算数据中心的建设，整体系统采用国产AI芯片。

sentences.en: Meanwhile, the company recently completed the acquisition of XCore Sigma, a domestic AI heterogeneous computing software enterprise, further enhancing its AI infrastructure layout from computing resources to foundational software.
sentences.zh: 同时，公司近期完成了对国内AI异构计算软件企业XCore Sigma的收购，进一步完善了公司从计算资源到基础软件的AI基础设施布局。

blocks.html_en: It is understood that XCore Sigma originated from the Compiler Laboratory of the Institute of Computing Technology at the Chinese Academy of Sciences. The company has long focused on heterogeneous computing software stacks, compiler optimization, runtime systems, and AI inference infrastructure, and is regarded as one of the leading AI Infra technology teams in China. This acquisition will enhance ZhiPu's capabilities in adapting to domestic chips, computing resource scheduling, and model deployment optimization.

sentences.zh: 公司长期专注于异构计算软件栈、编译器优化、运行时系统、AI推理基础设施等领域，被视为国内领先的AI基础设施技术团队之一。

sentences.en: This acquisition will enhance ZhiPu's capabilities in adapting to domestic chips, computing resource scheduling, and model deployment optimization.
sentences.zh: 此次收购将增强智普在国产芯片适配、计算资源调度、模型部署优化等方面的能力。

Among them, the 1GW-level domestic computing center can provide stable computing resources for large-scale model training; XCore Sigma's software technology helps improve the computing efficiency of different types of AI chips, enhancing hardware utilization and reducing model inference costs through compiler, Runtime, and inference engine optimizations.

sentences.en: Industry experts believe that ZhiPu's two recent moves correspond to the "computing power supply" and "computing power release" stages of the AI industry chain.
sentences.zh: 业内专家认为，智浦近期的两次动作对应了AI产业链的“算力供给”和“算力释放”阶段。

sentences.en: Among them, the 1GW-level domestic computing center can provide stable computing resources for large-scale model training; XCore Sigma's software technology helps improve the computing efficiency of different types of AI chips, enhancing hardware utilization and reducing model inference costs through compiler, Runtime, and inference engine optimizations.
sentences.zh: 其中，1GW级的国内计算中心可为大规模模型训练提供稳定的计算资源； XCore Sigma的软件技术通过编译器、运行时和推理引擎的优化，帮助提高不同类型AI芯片的计算效率，提高硬件利用率并降低模型推理成本。

blocks.html_en: As the competition in large models enters a stage where infrastructure and engineering capabilities are being compared, AI companies are shifting from merely pursuing model size to building a complete technical system covering chips, computing power, software stacks, and application deployment. Recently, the market has been closely watching ZhiPu's next-generation foundational models. Some views suggest that with the support of large-scale domestic computing resources, an established AI Infra system, and long-term accumulated post-training capabilities, ZhiPu's future models are expected to continue developing toward larger parameter scales and higher levels of intelligence, while improving inference efficiency and practical deployment capabilities.

sentences.en: As the competition in large models enters a stage where infrastructure and engineering capabilities are being compared, AI companies are shifting from merely pursuing model size to building a complete technical system covering chips, computing power, software stacks, and application deployment.
sentences.zh: 随着大模型的竞争进入比拼基础设施和工程能力的阶段，人工智能企业正从单纯追求模型尺寸转向构建涵盖芯片、算力、软件栈、应用部署等完整的技术体系。

sentences.en: Recently, the market has been closely watching ZhiPu's next-generation foundational models.
sentences.zh: 近期，市场密切关注智普的下一代基础车型。

sentences.en: Some views suggest that with the support of large-scale domestic computing resources, an established AI Infra system, and long-term accumulated post-training capabilities, ZhiPu's future models are expected to continue developing toward larger parameter scales and higher levels of intelligence, while improving inference efficiency and practical deployment capabilities.
sentences.zh: 有观点认为，在国内大规模计算资源、成熟的AI基础设施体系以及长期积累的后训练能力的支撑下，智普未来的模型有望继续向更大参数规模、更高智能水平方向发展，同时提升推理效率和实际部署能力。

blocks.html_en: This computing center construction and integration of basic software capabilities mark that domestic large model enterprises are accelerating the development of an autonomous and controllable AI infrastructure ecosystem, reflecting that AI industry competition is expanding from model capabilities to full-stack technological system competition.

sentences.en: This computing center construction and integration of basic software capabilities mark that domestic large model enterprises are accelerating the development of an autonomous and controllable AI infrastructure ecosystem, reflecting that AI industry competition is expanding from model capabilities to full-stack technological system competition.
sentences.zh: 此次计算中心建设和基础软件能力融合，标志着国内大型模型企业正在加速发展自主可控的人工智能基础设施生态系统，体现了人工智能产业竞争正在从模型能力竞争拓展到全栈技术体系竞争。

content_html_zh:
据外媒报道，智普AI（Z.ai）已完成国内1GW级AI计算数据中心的建设，整体系统采用国产AI芯片。 同时，公司近期完成了对国内AI异构计算软件企业XCore Sigma的收购，进一步完善了公司从计算资源到基础软件的AI基础设施布局。

据了解，XCore Sigma源自中科院计算技术研究所编译器实验室。 公司长期专注于异构计算软件栈、编译器优化、运行时系统、AI推理基础设施等领域，被视为国内领先的AI基础设施技术团队之一。 此次收购将增强智普在国产芯片适配、计算资源调度、模型部署优化等方面的能力。

业内专家认为，智浦近期的两次动作对应了AI产业链的“算力供给”和“算力释放”阶段。 其中，1GW级的国内计算中心可为大规模模型训练提供稳定的计算资源； XCore Sigma的软件技术通过编译器、运行时和推理引擎的优化，帮助提高不同类型AI芯片的计算效率，提高硬件利用率并降低模型推理成本。

随着大模型的竞争进入比拼基础设施和工程能力的阶段，人工智能企业正从单纯追求模型尺寸转向构建涵盖芯片、算力、软件栈、应用部署等完整的技术体系。 近期，市场密切关注智普的下一代基础车型。 有观点认为，在国内大规模计算资源、成熟的AI基础设施体系以及长期积累的后训练能力的支撑下，智普未来的模型有望继续向更大参数规模、更高智能水平方向发展，同时提升推理效率和实际部署能力。

此次计算中心建设和基础软件能力融合，标志着国内大型模型企业正在加速发展自主可控的人工智能基础设施生态系统，体现了人工智能产业竞争正在从模型能力竞争拓展到全栈技术体系竞争。
